description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a dark, wood-grain exterior and a sleek, polished finish. The front face features two large, light-colored drawers, each adorned with a decorative gold handle that has a geometric lattice pattern. The sides and top are uniformly finished in a deep, almost black wood with subtle brown streaks, giving it a luxurious and contemporary appearance. The drawers are inset within a thick, beveled frame, adding depth and visual interest to the design. The overall construction appears solid and robust, suitable for use in upscale urban interiors or lobbies. No glass panels or visible contents are present, and the cabinet stands freely on the ground.
description: A modern, dark wood cabinet with two light-colored drawers and gold lattice handles, featuring a sleek, polished finish and a thick beveled frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing a solid dark wood panel with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the continuous dark wood grain surface, with no visible openings or hardware.
description_view_2: Front view with two light-colored drawers, each with a gold lattice handle, framed by a thick dark wood border.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the uninterrupted dark wood grain surface.
